Button sizing adjusts via size tokens, not viewport
common_mistakes: Using div or anchor as button without proper role
Multiple primary buttons on the same view
Disabled buttons without explanation of why
No loading state for async actions
Generic labels like 'OK' or 'Click here'
Missing focus indicator
signals: Colored or bordered rectangle with text

patterns.name: Icon Button
patterns.description: Compact button containing only an icon, used for actions where the icon alone is universally understood (close, menu, settings, etc.).

variants.name: standard
variants.when_to_use: Default icon button with hover background

variants.name: filled
variants.when_to_use: Colored background for higher emphasis

variants.name: outlined
variants.when_to_use: Border outline for medium emphasis

variants.name: toggle
variants.when_to_use: Icon changes state on toggle (like/unlike, star/unstar)

accessibility_requirements: aria-label describing the action (e.g., 'Close dialog', not 'X')
Tooltip on hover/focus for sighted users
Toggle buttons use aria-pressed
Minimum 44x44 point touch target despite visual size
Focus indicator visible around the button boundary
responsive_behavior: Touch target may be larger than visual icon area
Spacing between icon buttons prevents mis-taps
Tooltip may become title attribute on touch devices
Icon size scales with button size token
common_mistakes: Missing aria-label making button inaccessible
Icon not universally understood without tooltip
Touch target smaller than minimum requirements
No tooltip for ambiguous icons
Using icon button for actions that need visible labels
signals: Small button with only an icon
Circular or square with rounded corners
Common icons like X, hamburger, gear

patterns.name: Button Group
patterns.description: Related action buttons visually connected as a group, often sharing borders and appearing as a unified control.

variants.name: toolbar
variants.when_to_use: Related formatting or view actions grouped together

variants.name: segmented
variants.when_to_use: Mutually exclusive options acting as toggle group

variants.name: split_action
variants.when_to_use: Primary action with dropdown for alternatives

variants.name: vertical
variants.when_to_use: Stacked vertical group of related actions

accessibility_requirements: role='group' with aria-label on container
role='toolbar' for toolbar variant with arrow key navigation
Segmented variant uses aria-pressed for toggle state
Individual buttons retain their own labels
Keyboard navigation between buttons in group
responsive_behavior: May switch from horizontal to vertical on mobile
May collapse into dropdown on very narrow screens
Button labels may truncate or show icons only
Group width adapts to container
common_mistakes: No grouping semantics (role='group' or role='toolbar')
Inconsistent button sizes within group
Too many buttons in group (consider dropdown)
Group border radius not applied correctly to first/last
Segmented control without toggle state management

patterns.name: Floating Action Button
patterns.description: Prominent circular button floating above the UI, representing the primary action for the current view (e.g., compose, add, create).

variants.name: standard
variants.when_to_use: Default circular FAB with icon

variants.name: mini
variants.when_to_use: Smaller FAB for secondary floating actions

variants.name: extended
variants.when_to_use: FAB with icon and text label for clarity

variants.name: speed_dial
variants.when_to_use: FAB that expands to show multiple actions

accessibility_requirements: aria-label describing the action
Extended variant preferred for clarity
Fixed position must not obscure important content
Focus indicator visible against any background
Speed dial items announced as menu
Keyboard accessible including speed dial actions
responsive_behavior: Position adjusts for safe area insets on mobile
Extended FAB may collapse to icon-only on scroll
FAB should not overlap bottom navigation
Z-index managed to stay above scrolling content
common_mistakes: FAB covering important content or actions
Multiple FABs on the same screen
FAB action not the actual primary action
Speed dial without labels on action items
No label making the FAB purpose ambiguous

patterns.name: Split Button
patterns.description: Dual-action button combining a primary action button with a dropdown trigger for alternative actions, separated by a visual divider.

variants.name: standard
variants.when_to_use: Primary action with dropdown for alternatives

variants.name: with_default_change
variants.when_to_use: Selected menu item becomes the primary action

variants.name: destructive
variants.when_to_use: Primary destructive action with safe alternatives

accessibility_requirements: Two distinct button elements, not one button
Dropdown trigger has aria-haspopup='menu' and aria-expanded
aria-label on dropdown trigger (e.g., 'More save options')
Menu follows dropdown menu ARIA pattern
Tab moves between primary button and dropdown trigger
Arrow keys navigate within the dropdown menu
responsive_behavior: May collapse into single button with dropdown on mobile
Full-width with proportional split on mobile
Dropdown repositions to stay in viewport
common_mistakes: Treating both parts as a single button
No visual divider between primary action and dropdown trigger
Dropdown trigger too small for touch
Primary action unclear from button label
No keyboard navigation between the two parts
signals: Button with two distinct click areas
